prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Detemir 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.3 kg; Height 175.1 cm; BMI 21.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.1%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.7%), FPG (12 months ago 219mg/dL; 9 months ago 286mg/dL; 6 months ago 229mg/dL; 3 months ago 320mg/dL; current 234mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 64.7kg; 9 months ago 65.2kg; 6 months ago 59.9kg; 3 months ago 62.8kg; current 65.3kg), Height (12 months ago 175.1cm; 9 months ago 175.1cm; 6 months ago 175.1cm; 3 months ago 175.1cm; current 175.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 106U/L; 9 months ago 98U/L; 6 months ago 97U/L; 3 months ago 97U/L; current 106U/L), AST (12 months ago 79U/L; 9 months ago 75U/L; 6 months ago 72U/L; 3 months ago 79U/L; current 80U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 5.2mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 4.9mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.4mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 2.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 2mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 208mg/g; 9 months ago 171mg/g; 6 months ago 174mg/g; 3 months ago 192mg/g; current 234mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 87mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 116mg/dL; 9 months ago 116mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 118mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.1g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.95 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
